emails.subject: RE: Concept for core/noncore Analysis for California
emails.subject_base: Concept for core/noncore Analysis for California
emails.body: One comments, as the DWR projections indicate, their price projection of spot (non-contracted) is not where the enter into their contracted amounts (notice non-contracted stays above contracted). Thus you do not see an MTM reduction over time.
